reviews.text: Restaurant quality at home! Added a splash of sesame oil and a pinch of gochugaru. Also added a dash of soy sauce and topped with sesame seeds.
Used tofu instead of beef. Added extra vegetables and a drizzle of chili oil. Served with kimchi on the side.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
